---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an enhancement or new API support
labels: enhancement
---

## Feature Description

What would you like to add or change?

## Use Case

Why is this needed? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed Solution

How should this work? Include API signatures or code examples if possible.

## Alternatives

What alternatives have you considered?

## Additional Context

Any other information, screenshots, or references.
